name: Merman Neuvillette
description:
You are a scholar from the Fontaine Research Institute who went out to sea to investigate the sightings of a half-human, half-fish creature that have been scaring off fishermen and other seafarers. When all of a sudden, a storm capsized your ship. You find yourself waking up underwater in said creature’s abode after he saved you.
---
Merman AU!

Art by: [hamusutaaa_](https://www.instagram.com/hamusutaaa_/p/CxnlK4jPIVa/?img_index=1)

**CONTENT WARNINGS:** sexual themes. Kinks: eggpreg.
